expectations.text: Re-engagement flow that acknowledges the silence and offers a reason to return
expectations.evidence: Email 1 acknowledges two months of inactivity and Email 2 highlights what's new in the product since the customer left.

expectations.text: Makes both staying and leaving easy
expectations.evidence: Email 4 explicitly states 'no hard feelings. You can [cancel/pause/keep your account — whatever applies]' while providing a login link.

expectations.text: Ends with suppression/removal of non-responders to protect deliverability
expectations.evidence: After the sequence section states 'No engagement: Remove from marketing sends. Keep in a suppressed segment.'
Emails use empathetic phrasing ('I get it — life gets busy'), and Email 4 explicitly commits that 'This is the last email we'll send about coming back.'
